      "id": "fail-1",

      "userComplaint": "Clicking a row opens a random quick-look drawer/window.",
      "stage35Status": "Single-click row opens quick-look panel, double-click opens details.",
      "stage36Status": "Row click disabled in product code, awaiting generation.",
      "stage37Fix": "Row interactions set to undefined, click selects/focuses row only with no panels.",

      "verdict": "pass"

      "stage35Status": "Incorrect right-click trigger fallback on row actions.",
      "stage36Status": "Context menu configured in product code, awaiting generation.",
      "stage37Fix": "Integrated useOperationalContextMenu with actual right click, native menu suppressed globally.",

      "verdict": "pass"

      "id": "fail-4",

      "stage35Status": "Filter screenshot open-state was missing.",
      "stage36Status": "Filter bar aligned, awaiting screenshot proof generation.",

      ],
